data.title: Why MARA Holdings Shares Are Surging Friday
data.description: Shares of MARA Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: MARA) experienced an increase in trading on Friday, in correlation with the rising prices of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). Bitcoin reached $71,194.33, marking a 1.14% increase over the past 24 hours according to CoinMarketCap. This surge reflects a general improvement in the sentiment surrounding digital assets. Bitcoin has maintained a 4.92% increase over the last week, prompting positive market reactions. The overall momentum in the cryptocurrency market remains robust, with Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) also seeing gains after significant Bitcoin acquisitions. Executive Chairman Michael Saylor recently mentioned on X about the time lapse between acquiring Bitcoin and its subsequent movement.

data.title: Hale Capital Partners Acquires APEX Analytics (formerly Voxtur Analytics), Expanding Strategic Investment in Real Estate Technology and Analytics
data.description: In New York on March 13, 2026, Hale Capital Management, a private equity firm based in the city, has successfully finalized the acquisition of a prominent real estate data analytics and valuation technology provider. Hale Capital specializes in investing in technology and technology-enabled businesses. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for the firm as it expands its portfolio. The financial details of the transaction, including the exact numbers involved, have not been disclosed to the public.

data.title: EQT exits Galderma Group AG in full via largest sponsor-backed block trade ever
data.description: EQT has finalized the sale of its remaining stake in Galderma, a leading global dermatology firm providing evidence-based solutions to healthcare providers, consumers, and patients across the globe. During EQT's ownership, Galderma experienced a notable surge in revenue growth and boosted research spending.

data.title: Pivot Bio CEO Chris Abbott to Present at World Agri-Tech Innovation Summit
data.description: Pivot Bio, a top agtech company, will be featured at the World Agri-Tech Innovation Summit from March 16-18, 2026. Chris Abbott, CEO, will engage in a fireside chat titled “Capturing Innovation in a Transformed Agri-Food Landscape” on the Main Stage on March 17 at 4:15 p.m. PT with Scott H. Hutchins, Under Secretary for Research, Education, and Economics & Chief Scientist.

data.title: Harvey AI broadens reach to 500 in-house legal teams, in addition to 1,000 law firms, eyeing an $11B valuation.
data.description: Harvey, a legal AI startup, has expanded its services to over 500 corporate legal departments and has gained 1,000 law firm customers. The company's platform facilitates collaboration between firms and clients. With ambitions for growth, Harvey is aiming for a valuation of $11 billion.

data.title: BTC's price struggles at $74,500 resistance. Shallow pullback expected; possible breakout for altcoins like ETH and ADA.
data.description: Bitcoin encountered significant resistance around the $74,500 mark, prompting a minor decrease in price. This slight pullback might pave the way for a more forceful breakout in both Bitcoin (BTC) and alternative cryptocurrencies (altcoins).

data.title: XRP Holds Key Support Against Bitcoin, Gold: Is A Reversal Next?
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is showing signs of a potential recovery as crucial support levels hold up against Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and gold. Bitcoin has been fluctuating within a specific range since early February, with both the upper and lower limits being tested multiple times. Cryptocurrency analyst Cryptoinsightuk highlighted in a recent podcast the significance of these range highs, which could either signal a potential reversal or transform into breakout areas if there is a surge in buying activity. At the moment, XRP is positioned close to the lower boundary of its range against other assets. For more details, refer to the complete article on the Benzinga website.

data.title: JSOC IT Launches AUTOPSY — The Security Verification Platform That Runs the Investigation Before the Breach, Not After It
data.description: Washington, DC - JSOC IT, a leading cybersecurity company specializing in embedded Forward Deployed Engineering operations in regulated sectors, has introduced AUTOPSY, a new security verification system. This platform evaluates a company's security framework through real-time API connections proactively, aiming to prevent breaches rather than reactively addressing them. Its primary tool, READY™, represents the initial security assessment product of its kind, replacing traditional self-reported evaluations.

data.title: Rendeavour and Wellington College Education to open global British School in Tatu City, Kenya
data.description: In Tatu City, Kenya, on March 13, 2026, Rendeavour, a prominent city developer in Africa, partnered with Wellington College Education, a top British educational network, to establish a co-educational day and boarding school. The school will cater to 1,500 students between the ages of 3 and 18. Set to open in September, this initiative aims to provide quality education within the region.

data.title: A New Method Produces CAR-T Cells to Keep Fighting Disease Longer
data.description: A fresh approach has been introduced by scientists at Albert Einstein College of Medicine in the Bronx, New York, on March 13, 2026. The innovative strategy aims to enhance immune cells, potentially improving blood cancer therapy. This method shows promising results in significantly extending the lifespan of these cells. The development could also have implications for HIV research, inching closer to a potential cure.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Drops As Oil Up After Bessent's Remark; Insulin Stock Takes A Plunge (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected inflation and GDP figures. Adobe stock notably dropped due to earnings. In the current stock market scenario, the Nasdaq also fell while oil prices increased after a statement from Bessent. Additionally, insulin stock witnessed a significant plunge. Stay updated with live coverage on this market development.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Eye Third Week Of Losses; IPO Name Plummets (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced a decline on Friday following unexpected inflation and GDP figures. Adobe stock dropped significantly due to disappointing earnings. Today's stock market performance sees the Nasdaq and S&P 500 potentially heading towards a third consecutive week of losses, with an IPO name experiencing a sharp decline.
